_notes: Research-grade mRNA synthesis vendors. Pricing is representative; confirm with vendor before ordering. Lead times reflect typical research-grade turnaround for <1kb IVT mRNA with standard modifications (N1-methylpseudouridine + Cap-1 + polyA).

vendors.name: Twist Bioscience
vendors.notes: Cheapest DNA template source. mRNA production requires IVT downstream.

vendors.name: TriLink BioTechnologies
vendors.notes: Gold standard for research-grade IVT mRNA. CleanCap Cap-1 + modified bases standard.

vendors.name: Aldevron (Danaher)
vendors.notes: GMP-grade. Overkill for a single dog; use for multi-patient trials.

vendors.name: Maravai LifeSciences
vendors.notes: Parent company of TriLink. Good for mid-scale orders.

vendors.name: IDT (Integrated DNA Technologies)
vendors.notes: Fastest turnaround for DNA templates. Requires downstream IVT.

vendors.name: Precision NanoSystems (Cytiva)
vendors.notes: Benchtop NanoAssemblr instrument or contract formulation. Royalty-free ionizable lipid.

vendors.name: Acuitas Therapeutics
vendors.notes: Best-in-class LNP IP. License required; typical for clinical programs, not individual cases.

vendors.name: Genevant Sciences
vendors.notes: Alternative LNP licensor with clinically-validated formulations.
